Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex

Class ImportedTransaction

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex.ImportedTransaction
public class ImportedTransaction extends Object
Represents a transaction imported from an external source, such as an OFX file. This class holds the raw details of the transaction as imported, before it is processed and converted into the application's internal transaction format.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • ImportedTransaction

      public ImportedTransaction()
      Default constructor. Initializes all fields to their default values (null for objects, 0 for primitives if any).

    • ImportedTransaction

      public ImportedTransaction(LocalDate datePosted, BigDecimal amount, String description, String memo, String transactionId, String currency, String originalAccountType, String originalAccountNumber)
      Constructs an ImportedTransaction with all its details.
      Parameters:
      datePosted - The date the transaction was posted.
      amount - The monetary amount of the transaction.
      description - The primary description or payee of the transaction.
      memo - Additional memo or details for the transaction.
      transactionId - The unique ID of the transaction from its original source.
      currency - The currency code of the transaction amount.
      originalAccountType - The type of the account from the source file (e.g., "BANK").
      originalAccountNumber - The account number from the source file.

  • Method Details

    • getDatePosted

      public LocalDate getDatePosted()
      Gets the date when the transaction was posted.
      Returns:
      The posting date.

    • setDatePosted

      public void setDatePosted(LocalDate datePosted)
      Sets the date when the transaction was posted.
      Parameters:
      datePosted - The posting date to set.

    • getAmount

      public BigDecimal getAmount()
      Gets the monetary amount of the transaction.
      Returns:
      The transaction amount.

    • setAmount

      public void setAmount(BigDecimal amount)
      Sets the monetary amount of the transaction.
      Parameters:
      amount - The transaction amount to set.

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the primary description of the transaction (often the payee).
      Returns:
      The transaction description.

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Sets the primary description of the transaction.
      Parameters:
      description - The transaction description to set.

    • getMemo

      public String getMemo()
      Gets the additional memo or details for the transaction.
      Returns:
      The transaction memo.

    • setMemo

      public void setMemo(String memo)
      Sets the additional memo or details for the transaction.
      Parameters:
      memo - The transaction memo to set.

    • getTransactionId

      public String getTransactionId()
      Gets the unique transaction identifier from the original source.
      Returns:
      The transaction ID (e.g., FITID).

    • setTransactionId

      public void setTransactionId(String transactionId)
      Sets the unique transaction identifier from the original source.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - The transaction ID to set.

    • getCurrency

      public String getCurrency()
      Gets the currency code of the transaction.
      Returns:
      The currency code (e.g., "USD"), or null if not set.

    • setCurrency

      public void setCurrency(String currency)
      Sets the currency code of the transaction.
      Parameters:
      currency - The currency code to set (e.g., "USD").

    • getOriginalAccountType

      public String getOriginalAccountType()
      Gets the original account type from the imported file (e.g., "BANK", "CREDITCARD").
      Returns:
      The original account type.

    • setOriginalAccountType

      public void setOriginalAccountType(String originalAccountType)
      Sets the original account type from the imported file.
      Parameters:
      originalAccountType - The original account type to set.

    • getOriginalAccountNumber

      public String getOriginalAccountNumber()
      Gets the original account number from the imported file.
      Returns:
      The original account number.

    • setOriginalAccountNumber

      public void setOriginalAccountNumber(String originalAccountNumber)
      Sets the original account number from the imported file.
      Parameters:
      originalAccountNumber - The original account number to set.

    • setCurrency

      public void setCurrency(com.webcohesion.ofx4j.domain.data.common.Currency currencyInstance)
      Sets the currency of the transaction using an OFX4J Currency object. The currency code is stored as a string.
      Parameters:
      currencyInstance - The Currency object from which to set the currency. If null, the behavior depends on toString().
